notes.title: One north star
notes.body: A cycle with ten priorities has none. Everything ladders up to a single objective or it is cut.

notes.title: Impact over effort
notes.body: Rank aims by impact-over-effort. The bottom quartile is deferred, not debated.

notes.title: Readout as contract
notes.body: The one-page north-star readout is the interface: aims, owners, key results, status. Measured weekly.
